so having that shorter avg life.firstName: 5.	Geoff – how the different fixed income market can benefit from higher rates
so having that shorter avg life.lastName: new home loan at higher rates
so having that shorter avg life.firmName: corporate bonds purchased at higher interest rate
so having that shorter avg life.city: what is lag of rising rate and those parts that benefit from the increase? Look at the Average life of portfolio. Avg life of ANGIX is 4.5 years. Every 4.5 years
so having that shorter avg life.state: that’s when on average are due
so having that shorter avg life.metro: we have assets due every month so that is why a lot of pundits are talking about structured credit because it has that monthly cash flow – where you can continually reinvest that money. Corporate credit has avg life of 10 years. IG Corp has maturity of 7 years but with avg life of 11 years. Avg life on AGG is 8.7
so having that shorter avg life.trip: so having that shorter avg life
